/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/schedule_manager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/UserManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/HomeWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/Task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/schedule_manager.dir/TaskManager.cpp.o -o schedule_manager  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
